x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Customer and asset location data is critical for Now Assist FSM AI scheduling optimization and travel time calculation.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all work orders have a location record linked. Enforce via mandatory field at work order creation. Geocode customer addresses where possible. Target: 90%+ of work orders with location data.
